prompt: search for remote delivery manager or program manager roles and add them — I want to see what's out there

assertions.description: Output contains the ━━━ terminal summary block with Found/Verified/Skipped/Added counts
Every inserted job has non-null salary_min and salary_max
Any inserted job without a listed salary has '[estimated salary]' in notes
Inserted jobs have source set to 'find-jobs skill'
All inserted jobs are Remote, Hybrid, or Barcelona — no office-only jobs in unrelated cities
At least one job was successfully inserted into Supabase
